org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 AbstractReferenceBuilder<T extends AbstractReferenceConfig,B extends AbstractReferenceBuilder<T,B>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<T,B>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractMethodBuilder<T,B>
        • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T,B>
          • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractReferenceBuilder<T,B>
  • 直接已知子类:
    ConsumerBuilder, ReferenceBuilder

    public abstract class AbstractReferenceBuilder<T extends AbstractReferenceConfig,B extends AbstractReferenceBuilder<T,B>>
extends AbstractInterfaceBuilder<T,B>
    AbstractBuilder
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
